allow: Bash(node -e "const d = require\('/c/Users/USER/Downloads/reservation-safari/server/data.json'\); console.log\(d.users?.slice\(0,3\).map\(u => \({email: u.email, role: u.role}\)\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(u['email'], u['role']\) for u in d.get\('users',[]\)[:5]]")

Bash(node -e "const l = require\('lucide-react'\); const keys = Object.keys\(l\); console.log\('FileDown:', !!l.FileDown, 'FileText:', !!l.FileText, 'FileSpreadsheet:', !!l.FileSpreadsheet, 'ArrowDownToLine:', !!l.ArrowDownToLine, 'DownloadCloud:', !!l.DownloadCloud, 'FileDown:', !!l.FileDown, 'Sheet:', !!l.Sheet\);")

Bash(node -e "const l = require\('lucide-react'\); const keys = Object.keys\(l\); const d = keys.filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('down'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('file'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('doc'\)\); console.log\(d.slice\(0,30\).join\(', '\)\);")

Bash(node -e "import\('lucide-react'\).then\(l => { const keys = Object.keys\(l\); const d = keys.filter\(k => /down|file|doc|report|export|csv|pdf/i.test\(k\)\); console.log\(d.join\(', '\)\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "import\('lucide-react'\).then\(l => { const keys = Object.keys\(l\); const t = keys.filter\(k => /^table|^spread|^grid/i.test\(k\) && !k.endsWith\('Icon'\) && !k.startsWith\('Lucide'\)\); console.log\(t.join\(', '\)\); }\);")
Bash(npx --no-install tsc --noEmit --jsx react-jsx --moduleResolution bundler --allowImportingTsExtensions --target esnext src/pages/Messages.jsx)
Bash(node -e "const d = require\('C:/Users/USER/Downloads/reservation-safari/server/data.json'\); console.log\('users:', \(d.users || []\).map\(u => \({ email: u.email, role: u.role }\)\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const i=require\('./i18n'\); console.log\('EN:', i.t\('email.booking_confirmed.subject', 'en', { ref: 'SF-XYZ' }\)\); console.log\('FR:', i.t\('email.booking_confirmed.subject', 'fr', { ref: 'SF-XYZ' }\)\); console.log\('SW:', i.t\('email.booking_confirmed.subject', 'sw', { ref: 'SF-XYZ' }\)\); console.log\('IT:', i.t\('email.booking_confirmed.subject', 'it', { ref: 'SF-XYZ' }\)\); console.log\('DE:', i.t\('email.booking_confirmed.subject', 'de', { ref: 'SF-XYZ' }\)\);")
